verdict.rationale: The claim's EUR 12.849m matches the v1 finance pack, which is explicitly marked 'PRELIMINARY - superseded on 15 July 2026 by restated v2'; the current authoritative v2 figure is EUR 13.032m (corroborated by the management commentary's EUR 13.03m gross result).
verdict.suggested_action: Update the master document's Q2 2026 gross profit to EUR 13.03 million (the v2 restated figure) and discard the superseded v1 value.

evidence.span_text: PRELIMINARY - superseded on 15 July 2026 by restated v2.
Trading in Q2 2026 developed in line with the restated plan. Net revenue reached EUR 21.89 million, with the gross result at EUR 13.03 million and an adjusted operating result of EUR 5.75 million.

{"doc_id":"vantage-commentary-2026q2","location":"page:1","text":"VANTAGE INDUSTRIAL GROUP
Q2 2026 Management Commentary
Letter to the supervisory board
Trading in Q2 2026 developed in line with the restated plan. Net revenue reached EUR 21.89 million, with the gross
result at EUR 13.03 million and an adjusted operating result of EUR 5.75 million.
Customer sentiment strengthened again: the group-wide net promoter score came in at 38 for the quarter, and the
gross renewal rate held at 91.4% across the installed base.
Delivery efficiency improved. The median onboarding cycle for new enterprise customers was 27 days, and the
certified implementation partner network grew to 80 partners at quarter end.
The workforce closed at 224 full-time equivalents, supported by 26 external contract staff.
Confidential | Synthetic Proofbench fixture
Page 1
"}

final_text:
This is a clear-cut explicit supersession. The v1 finance pack bears the note "PRELIMINARY - superseded on 15 July 2026 by restated v2," while v2 states "Final restatement, approved 15 July 2026." The management commentary cites the restated EUR 13.03 million gross result. The claim's EUR 12.849m matches the superseded v1 figure, not the current authoritative v2 figure (EUR 13.032m).
